sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Changelog sources to monitor. Each needs template OR (url + selector).

since.title: Since date (ISO 8601)
since.description: Override KV state — only return entries after this date.

severityFilter.title: Minimum severity
severityFilter.description: Minimum severity level to include in output.

enableLlmSummary.title: Enable LLM summary
enableLlmSummary.description: Use an LLM to generate impact summaries for each entry.

llmModel.title: LLM model
llmModel.description: Model identifier passed to the LLM API.
